test_name: Verify User Login with Google Integration
description: This test verifies that a user can successfully log into the Roost Enterprise platform using the Google integration option.
steps: Navigate to the login page at https://dev.roost.ai/login.
Verify the presence of the Google sign-in button.
Click on the Google sign-in button.
Enter valid Google credentials (email and password).
Wait for redirection back to the Roost Enterprise dashboard.
Verify that the user is successfully logged in by checking for a welcome message or user profile icon.
Log out of the Roost Enterprise platform.
Verify that the user is redirected back to the login page.
expected_results: User is redirected to Google's authentication page.
User is successfully authenticated and redirected back to the Roost Enterprise dashboard.
User session is active, and user-specific elements are visible.
edge_cases: Google authentication page fails to load.
Redirection back to the Roost Enterprise dashboard fails.
User session is not established after login.
Network issues during Google sign-in attempt.
data_requirements: Access to the Roost Enterprise platform.
Network connection with access to Google services.
Roost Enterprise user profile associated with the Google account.
dependencies: User must have a pre-existing Roost account linked to Google.
Browser cookies and cache are enabled.
api_interactions: OAuth2 token exchange between Roost and Google.
performance_metrics: Time taken to load the Google authentication page.
Time taken to authenticate and redirect back to the dashboard.
accessibility_requirements: Ensure Google login button is accessible via keyboard navigation.
Verify screen reader compatibility with the login page.
Contrast ratios for readability on the login page.
